title: Scott's Tap Water Substitute
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dqmof","text":"Used as a bluing agent in H\u0026E staining","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: weigh 20 g of Magnesium Sulfate Heptahydrate Fisher Scientific Catalog #M63-500
weigh 2 g of Sodium Bicarbonate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #s-5761
Mix in ddWater until completely dissolved store at room temperature pH 8.3 to pH 8.7
